title: hydrangea serrata var. japonica
intro: Hydrangea serrata var. japonica, also known as the mountain hydrangea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Hydrangiaceae that is native to Japan and Korea. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of hydrangea serrata var. japonica include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as supporting the immune system and digestive health. Herbal preparations of hydrangea serrata var. japonica include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, such as arthritis, fever, and digestive issues.
